title: ctenopteris mollissima
intro: Ctenopteris mollissima, also known as the hairy wood fern or hirsute ctenopteris, is a type of fern species native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ctenopteris mollissima are said to include reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as promoting wound healing and skin care. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris mollissima is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
